flashcards.definition: I = P × A × T : Environmental Impact = Population × Affluence (consumption per capita) × Technology (impact per unit of consumption).
Total greenhouse gas emissions (in CO₂ equivalents) caused by an individual, event, product, or organization.
Human Development Index: composite measure of health (life expectancy), education, and standard of living.
Alternative to GDP that adds value of positive non-market activities and subtracts costs of environmental degradation and social problems.
The capacity of ecosystems to produce biological materials and absorb waste — compared to ecological footprint.
